new_classes.definition_en: Concentrated grape must that has been rectified (purified), classified under CN subheading 22043096 (Chapter 22). Distinguished from non-concentrated grape must (CN 22043010 partially fermented, CN 22043092 other concentrated) by its concentrated and rectified character as defined in Additional Note 7 to Chapter 22.

coverage_explanation: The legal text for CN 22043096 identifies the product as "concentrated" grape must and cross-references Additional Note 7 to Chapter 22, which defines "rectified concentrated grape must" (RCM). The new class captures: (1) membership in the GrapeMust hierarchy, (2) the CN subheading code 22043096, (3) the non-fermented-by-alcohol-arrest character (distinguishing it from CN 22043010 partially fermented and CN 22043092 other concentrated). However, the full definitional criteria of Additional Note 7 (e.g. specific Brix/density thresholds, ion content limits, and other physicochemical parameters that define rectification/concentration) cannot be axiomatised without those precise numeric values being present in the provided legal text snippet. The coverage is therefore partial (0.7) — the product type and CN code are correctly placed in the hierarchy, but the physicochemical discrimination criteria from Additional Note 7 are not fully captured.
